title: Describing Life Changes
description: Vocabulary and structures for big life events: moving, starting a business, changing careers.
summary_pt_br: Mudanças de vida: 'Decidi largar', 'Dei o salto', 'Melhor decisão', 'Olhando para trás'.

scenes.subtitle_en: Vocabulary and structures for big life events: moving, starting a business, changing careers.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Mudanças de vida: 'Decidi largar', 'Dei o salto', 'Melhor decisão', 'Olhando para trás'.

scenes.text_en: Vocabulary and structures for big life events: moving, starting a business, changing careers. Today's focus: describing life changes. I quit my corporate job to start the food truck.
scenes.text_pt: Mudanças de vida: 'Decidi largar', 'Dei o salto', 'Melhor decisão', 'Olhando para trás'. Foco de hoje: describing life changes. Larguei o emprego corporativo pra abrir o food truck.

scenes.title: Describing Life Changes
scenes.body_en: Key phrases: 'I decided to quit my job.', 'I took the leap and started...', 'It was the best decision I ever made.', 'Looking back, I...'
scenes.body_pt: Mudanças de vida: 'Decidi largar', 'Dei o salto', 'Melhor decisão', 'Olhando para trás'.

examples.en: I quit my corporate job to start the food truck.
examples.pt: Larguei o emprego corporativo pra abrir o food truck.

examples.en: It was the best decision I've ever made.
examples.pt: Foi a melhor decisão que já tomei.

examples.en: Looking back, I wish I had started sooner.
examples.pt: Olhando pra trás, queria ter começado antes.

exercise.question: Complete: "I quit my ___ job to start the food truck."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "I quit my corporate job to start the food truck."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Larguei o emprego corporativo pra abrir o food truck.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
It was the best decision I've ever made.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "It was the best decision I've ever made."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Foi a melhor decisão que já tomei.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Describing Life Changes — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre describing life changes. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Rafa, why did you leave the bank to sell tacos?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I quit because the work drained my soul.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What finally pushed you to take the leap?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: My daughter asked me why I looked so sad every night.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Was it scary to start your own business?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What's the biggest milestone so far?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Hiring my first full-time employee last year.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Any regrets about leaving corporate life?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Only that I didn't quit five years earlier.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Your life now matches your values. That's rare.

scenes.title: The day Rafa quit
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Tell the story of Rafa's career change. Use at least three life-change phrases.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Five years ago, Rafa sat in a glass office tower filling out yet another spreadsheet he didn't care about.

paragraphs.speaker: Rafa
paragraphs.en: I quit my corporate job after my daughter asked why I came home so sad every single day.

paragraphs.speaker: Wife
paragraphs.en: He took the leap with just three months of savings and a head full of taco recipes.

paragraphs.speaker: Rafa
paragraphs.en: Looking back, I wish I had done it five years earlier when I was still in my twenties.

paragraphs.speaker: Daughter
paragraphs.en: Dad is way more fun now. He even sings while he cooks on Saturday mornings.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Big life changes, Rafa often said, are mostly small daily decisions stacked on top of each other.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Describing Life Changes". Vocabulary and structures for big life events: moving, starting a business, changing careers. I quit my corporate job to start the food truck. It was the best decision I've ever made. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Describing Life Changes". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Describing Life Changes".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
